fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: hero_sub
fields.default_value: WCS helps commercial property owners, hotels, resorts, and estates reduce outdoor water waste, lower operating costs, and protect landscape quality — through precision irrigation engineering and performance-based delivery.

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: about_heading
fields.default_value: Water is the UAE’s most critical operating cost you’re not controlling

fields.label: Body Paragraph 1
fields.name: about_body_1
fields.default_value: In the Gulf, landscapes consume a disproportionate share of total water use. Irrigation systems are often outdated, poorly calibrated, and disconnected from actual plant water demand. The result: invisible waste, avoidable utility bills, declining landscape performance, and missed sustainability targets.

fields.label: Body Paragraph 2
fields.name: about_body_2
fields.default_value: WCS was built to close that gap. We work at the intersection of landscape systems, irrigation engineering, and demand-side management — combining field capability with data intelligence to deliver verified savings while protecting the quality and value of your outdoor environment.

fields.label: Pull Quote
fields.name: about_quote
fields.default_value: “To give each plant as much water as it needs — but not more.”

fields.label: Stat Label
fields.name: about_stat_label
fields.default_value: Typical potable water reduction per project

fields.label: Pillar 1 — Body
fields.name: pillar_1_body
fields.default_value: Irrigation is where the largest, most recoverable outdoor water losses occur. WCS starts here: auditing performance, identifying waste, and implementing smart, accountable upgrades that generate measurable savings from day one.

fields.label: Pillar 2 — Body
fields.name: pillar_2_body
fields.default_value: Beyond irrigation, WCS extends into alternative water sources, soil and planting optimization, recycled water integration, xeriscaping, and groundwater conservation — a complete demand-side management platform for outdoor water use.

fields.label: Pillar 3 — Body
fields.name: pillar_3_body
fields.default_value: We take full ownership from diagnosis through design, implementation, monitoring, and long-term performance reporting. Clients receive verified savings, transparent data, and a partner accountable for results — not just recommendations.

fields.label: Project 1 — Title
fields.name: proj1_title
fields.default_value: Tarsheed Programme — Irrigation Efficiency at Municipal Scale

fields.label: Project 1 — Description
fields.name: proj1_desc
fields.default_value: Delivered across multiple municipal landscape assets in Abu Dhabi, the Tarsheed engagement applied systematic irrigation auditing, system upgrades, smart controls, and demand-side recalibration to reduce potable water use across large public realm areas. Interventions included emitter optimization, leak detection, scheduling reform, and baseline verification reporting.

fields.label: Project 2 — Description
fields.name: proj2_desc
fields.default_value: Baseline consumption of approximately 1,800 m³/day reduced to approximately 1,100 m³/day through structured demand analysis, irrigation system retrofit, and performance monitoring. Certain months achieved up to 50% total savings against the established baseline.

fields.label: Project 3 — Description
fields.name: proj3_desc
fields.default_value: Applied demand-side management methodology to reduce irrigation-driven groundwater extraction in planted forest environments. Detailed plant typology mapping, water demand analysis, and irrigation system assessment identified a 45–50% reduction potential — supporting long-term groundwater security without compromising forest health.

fields.label: Innovation Note — Body
fields.name: innovation_body
fields.default_value: An ongoing pilot exploring integrated stormwater capture, greywater recycling, and smart soil management to create closed-loop water systems within urban landscape environments. Details available on request.

fields.label: Intro Body
fields.name: process_intro_body
fields.default_value: WCS does not deliver advisory reports and disappear. Our engagement model is built around accountability for outcomes: structured intake, rigorous baseline, tailored strategy, phased delivery, and continuous monitoring with transparent reporting against agreed targets.

fields.label: Step 1 — Description
fields.name: step1_desc
fields.default_value: We collect your utility bills, site area, planted typologies, current irrigation specifications, and tariff structure. This data forms the factual foundation for all downstream analysis and is handled with discretion.

fields.label: Step 1 — Tags (comma-separated)
fields.name: step1_tags
fields.default_value: Utility bills, Site area, Plant typologies, Irrigation specs, Tariff structure

fields.label: Step 2 — Description
fields.name: step2_desc
fields.default_value: A structured field audit assesses actual irrigation performance, system condition, leakage risk, distribution uniformity, scheduling practices, and measurable gaps between current consumption and plant water demand. We establish a verified baseline — the reference point for all savings claims.

fields.label: Step 2 — Tags
fields.name: step2_tags
fields.default_value: Irrigation audit, Leak detection, System efficiency, Baseline verification

fields.label: Step 3 — Description
fields.name: step3_desc
fields.default_value: We benchmark actual irrigation demand against plant quantities, planted areas, and municipality or QCC guidance on water requirements by plant type. This analysis reveals the gap between what is being applied and what is actually needed — quantifying the waste in financial and volumetric terms.

fields.label: Step 3 — Tags
fields.name: step3_tags
fields.default_value: Plant demand coefficients, QCC benchmarks, Municipality guidance, Waste quantification

fields.label: Step 4 — Description
fields.name: step4_desc
fields.default_value: We design a tailored intervention package combining the highest-value measures for your asset: smart controllers, soil moisture sensors, pressure regulation, scheduling reform, emitter upgrades, leak resolution, recycled water integration, and xeriscaping options.

fields.label: Step 4 — Tags
fields.name: step4_tags
fields.default_value: Smart controls, Sensor systems, Pressure regulation, Recycled water, Xeriscaping, DBOM options

fields.label: Step 5 — Description
fields.name: step5_desc
fields.default_value: Phased delivery with minimal disruption to your operations and landscape. WCS manages or supervises all installation works, ensures quality control, and maintains landscape condition throughout the transition.

fields.label: Step 5 — Tags
fields.name: step5_tags
fields.default_value: Phased delivery, Quality control, Minimal disruption, FM coordination

fields.label: Step 6 — Description
fields.name: step6_desc
fields.default_value: After implementation, WCS remains engaged. We operate monitoring systems, maintain performance dashboards, produce transparent savings reports, and quantify results against the agreed baseline on a monthly basis.

fields.label: Step 6 — Tags
fields.name: step6_tags
fields.default_value: Remote monitoring, Savings dashboard, Monthly reporting, Verified outcomes

fields.label: Delivery Model 1 — Body
fields.name: dm1_body
fields.default_value: Design-Build-Operate-Maintain delivery removes the need for large upfront capital budgets.

fields.label: Delivery Model 2 — Body
fields.name: dm2_body
fields.default_value: WCS is remunerated from the savings generated. If savings don’t materialize, neither does our fee.

fields.label: Delivery Model 3 — Body
fields.name: dm3_body
fields.default_value: System improvements structured so monthly bill savings cover the cost of implementation over time.

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: calc_heading
fields.default_value: How much are you paying for water you don’t need?

fields.label: Body Paragraph 1
fields.name: calc_body_1
fields.default_value: Enter your outdoor area, planting mix, and water bills. The WCS calculator estimates your current irrigation cost, what efficient irrigation should cost, and the gap between the two — giving you an indicative view of the savings opportunity on your property.

fields.label: Body Paragraph 2
fields.name: calc_body_2
fields.default_value: Applicable to hotels, resorts, sports clubs, commercial compounds, embassies, villas, and mixed-use developments across the UAE. Results are indicative — final savings depend on a site audit, hardware condition, operating schedules, water source, and tariff structure.

fields.label: Disclaimer Note
fields.name: calc_note
fields.default_value: Indicative only. Values shown are for illustration. Open the calculator to enter your actual data.

fields.label: Body
fields.name: contact_body
fields.default_value: If you own or operate a commercial property, hotel, resort, sports facility, embassy, or large residential estate in the UAE — and you pay full water tariff — we can almost certainly help you spend less. Start with a conversation.

fields.label: Closing Quote
fields.name: contact_closing_quote
fields.default_value: “Every litre saved is a cost eliminated, a landscape protected, and a sustainability target met. WCS exists to make that outcome reliable, measurable, and repeatable.”

fields.label: Sub-heading
fields.name: calc_page_subheading
fields.default_value: Estimate your irrigation savings potential based on your outdoor area, planting mix, and utility bills. Results are indicative — a site audit will provide verified figures.

fields.label: Disclaimer
fields.name: calc_page_disclaimer
fields.default_value: Indicative only. Final savings depend on site audit findings, irrigation hardware condition, operating schedules, water source, soil conditions, and applicable tariff structure. This calculator is a planning tool, not an engineering guarantee.

fields.label: Tariff Info Text
fields.name: calc_tariff_info
fields.default_value: Tariff reference: TAQA Abu Dhabi residential ≈ AED 2.95–6.65/m³ · DEWA Dubai ≈ AED 3.12–8.59/m³ · Commercial tariffs vary. The calculator uses your bill data — not assumed tariff rates.

fields.label: Coefficients Note
fields.name: calc_coefficients_note
fields.default_value: The following irrigation demand coefficients are used to estimate efficient water requirements by plant type. These are planning-level values based on typical UAE climate conditions.

fields.label: Site Tagline
fields.name: site_tagline
fields.default_value: UAE’s specialist water conservation partner — irrigation engineering, demand-side management, and performance-based delivery for commercial and high-value residential assets.

fields.label: Philosophy Quote
fields.name: site_philosophy
fields.default_value: “To give each plant as much water as it needs — but not more.”
